name: Hot & Sour Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the mushrooms in hot water for 30 minutes. Drain them and remove and discard the stems. Shred the caps.
2. Heat the vegetable oil in a heavy-duty saucepan. Add the shredded mushroom caps and ginger, and stir over moderately high heat for one minute.
3. Add the bamboo shoots and stir for an additional minute.
4. Add the chicken stock, pork slices, and soy sauce. Bring to a boil and simmer for ten minutes.
5. Add the tofu and cook for three more minutes.
6. Dissolve cornstarch in 1/4 cup cold water. Stir this mixture into the soup along with white pepper and rice wine vinegar.
7. Cook until the mixture thickens and clears. Turn off the heat.
8. Drizzle the beaten egg over the top of the soup. Stir gently.
9. When the egg sets, serve garnished with chopped scallions, coriander leaves, and sesame oil to taste.
